entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low rainfall and high evaporation rates where climate resilience is needed.

entities.name: INTEGRATED HOLISTIC APPROACH
entities.description: A comprehensive strategy for harnessing the potential of rain-fed agriculture through multiple interventions.

entities.name: RAIN-FED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies solely or primarily on rainfall for water.

entities.name: RAINWATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of collecting and storing rainwater for agricultural use, including harvesting and recharging.

entities.name: GROUNDWATER RECHARGING
entities.description: The process of adding water to an aquifer to increase the available water supply.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input or area.

entities.name: WATER USE EFFICIENCY
entities.description: The ratio of water used by the crop to the amount of water applied.

entities.name: CONSORTIUM
entities.description: A collaborative group of organizations working together to provide integrated solutions.

entities.name: PARTNERSHIPS
entities.description: Collaborative agreements between various stakeholders to achieve common goals.

entities.name: STAKEHOLDERS
entities.description: Entities including research institutions, development departments, NGOs, and private companies involved in the approach.
